_notes.sample_library: [LENGTH] 'Librería de samples' (19 chars) expands from 'Sample Library' (14 chars). Ontology term feat_00000008 used. Flag for design review if nav truncates.
_notes.melody_generator: [LENGTH] 'Generador de melodías' (21 chars) expands from 'Melody Generator' (16 chars). Ontology term feat_00000011 used. Flag for design review.
_notes.chord_progression: [LENGTH] 'Progresión de acordes' (21 chars) expands from 'Chord Progression' (17 chars). Nav label derived from feat_00000014; no standalone nav-label concept in ontology.
_notes.ai_composition: [LENGTH] 'Composición con IA' (18 chars) expands from 'AI Composition' (14 chars). 'IA' is the standard Spanish abbreviation for Artificial Intelligence per es-ES market guidelines.

_notes.greeting_morning: [PLACEHOLDER] {name} is user display name. Spanish time-of-day greetings ('Buenos días / Buenas tardes / Buenas noches') are gender-neutral — no inflected adjective required.
_notes.notifications_new_singular: [PLURAL] ICU plural rules applied. Singular: '{count} nueva notificación'. EN [GENDER HOOK] does not apply in Spanish for this construction.
_notes.notifications_new_plural: [PLURAL] Plural: '{count} notificaciones nuevas'. See singular note.

projects.empty_state_body: Crea tu primer proyecto y empieza a construir tu sonido.
projects.project_card_delete_confirm: ¿Eliminar "{project_name}"? Esta acción no se puede deshacer.
projects.storage_upgrade_prompt: Usas el {percent}% de tu almacenamiento. {upgrade_link} para obtener más.
projects.storage_almost_full: Almacenamiento casi lleno — mejora el plan

_notes.project_card_bpm_label: BPM is a universal music abbreviation — not translated. Kept per ontology and CLAUDE.md rules.
_notes.project_card_key_label: 'Tonalidad' is the standard Spanish music term for musical key. Longer than EN label (9 vs 3 chars) but semantically correct for this context.
_notes.project_card_tracks_singular: [PLURAL] {count} = integer. 'pista' is the approved es-ES term for 'track' per market file.
_notes.project_card_tracks_plural: [PLURAL] 'pistas' is the plural of 'pista'. See singular note.
_notes.project_card_last_edited: [PLACEHOLDER] {time_ago} is a runtime-generated relative time string localised separately. 'Editado' agrees with 'proyecto' (masculine noun in Spanish).
_notes.project_card_delete_confirm: [PLACEHOLDER] {project_name} is user-generated content — not translated. Quotation marks use standard es-ES typographic form ("). ¿? punctuation applied.
_notes.storage_used_label: [PLACEHOLDER] {used} and {total} are runtime storage values. 'utilizados' agrees with the implied masculine plural referent.
_notes.storage_upgrade_prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] {percent} is an integer; {upgrade_link} is an inline hyperlink. [EXPANSION RISK] String is longer than EN — monitor layout in billing UI.

_notes.field_bpm_label: BPM kept as-is. 'Tempo' is a music term understood in Spanish and not translated.
_notes.template_singer_songwriter: Transcreated as 'Cantautor/a' — the established Spanish term for singer-songwriter. Shorter than EN (11 vs 17 chars). '/a' form used for gender inclusivity in UI.
_notes.template_film_score: 'Banda sonora' is the standard Spanish equivalent for film score (musical soundtrack of a film, not a rating).
_notes.template_beatmaker: [REVIEW] 'Beatmaker' kept as anglicism. Term not in ontology — confirm with localization lead whether a localised form is preferred.
_notes.template_sound_design: [REVIEW] 'Sound Design' kept as anglicism per source note guidance. Term not in ontology — confirm approved es-ES form with localization lead.

studio.ai_composition_hint: Genera melodías, progresiones de acordes y patrones de batería con la IA de ECHOCRAFT. Tú eliges qué usar.

_notes.track_type_midi: MIDI is a technical acronym — not translated. 'Pista' is the approved es-ES term for 'track' (market file).
_notes.toolbar_loop: 'Loop' kept as anglicism — universally understood in music production in Spain and embedded in DAW vocabulary.
_notes.toolbar_save_status_saving: Trailing ellipsis (…) preserved per source instruction. Indicates loading state.
_notes.toolbar_save_status_saved: 'Todo guardado' (14 chars) is shorter than 'All changes saved' (17 chars) — no expansion concern.
_notes.toolbar_save_status_unsaved: [LENGTH] 'Cambios sin guardar' (19 chars) vs 'Unsaved changes' (15 chars). Status bar context with limited display space — flag for design review.
_notes.track_solo_tooltip: 'Solo' is an established music/DAW term universally understood in Spain — retained as anglicism.
_notes.ai_composition_label: Uses 'IA' (not 'AI') per es-ES market conventions. Must match nav.ai_composition — both use 'Composición con IA'.
_notes.ai_composition_hint: [REVIEW] 'Patrones de batería' used for 'drum patterns' — term not in ontology, confirm approved es-ES form. Agency cue ('Tú eliges qué usar') added per es-ES market AI transparency requirement. [EXPANSION RISK] String is longer than EN — monitor hint container dimensions.
